About me

Building, learning,
growing

I am Yassine Ouchene — a third-year Software Engineering student at Fontys University of Applied Sciences, specialising in Artificial Intelligence, with a solid background in ICT Network & Infrastructure.

At YouComm I work daily as a Software Developer (internship), building web applications that improve real business processes. My infrastructure background gives me a uniquely broad perspective as a developer.

I believe the best software is created where technical precision meets user experience — whether it is a smart web application, an automated system or an AI-driven solution, I deliver quality.
